arts.ttl: Report: PSG & Napoli Set for Crunch Khvicha Kvaratskhelia Meeting – Agreement on the Horizon
arts.sum: Napoli and Paris Saint-Germain are reportedly on the brink of agreeing Khvicha Kvaratskhelia's long-rumored transfer to Ligue 1. According to Gianluca Di Marzio, the clubs will hold a crunch meeting next week to iron out the final details ahead of the Georgian's move to France. The post Report: PSG & Napoli Set for Crunch Khvicha Kvaratskhelia Meeting – Agreement on the Horizon appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: Napoli to Meet with PSG to Finalise Kvaratskhelia move
arts.sum: Napoli are bracing for a busy January transfer window as discussions heat up regarding the future of star winger Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. The Georgian international, who has become a key player for the Azzurri, is reportedly on the verge of a move to Paris Saint-Germain, with an agreement already verbally established between the two clubs. The post Napoli to Meet with PSG to Finalise Kvaratskhelia move appeared first on FootItalia.com.
